name: Rindergulasch (Beef Goulash)
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat vegetable oil in a large frying pan or Dutch oven.
2. Add meat cubes and brown well for approximately 10 minutes.
3. Stir in onions; cook until soft.
4. Sprinkle with salt, pepper, garlic salt, paprika, and sugar.
5. Blend thoroughly.
6. Pour in hot water; cover and simmer gently for about 1 1/2 hours.
7. In a small jar or container, mix flour with cold water, ensuring all lumps are broken up.
8. Add the mixture to meat about 7 minutes before the end of cooking time.
9. Stir constantly until sauce thickens and bubbles.
10. Remove from heat; stir in cream.
11. Serve with noodles, accompanied by a tomato salad if desired.
